steps.title: Simplify both sides
steps.content:
For infinitely many solutions, the two sides must be identical for every $x$. Simplify each side.
$$\frac{16x+36}{4}-\frac{s}{11}=4x+9-\frac{s}{11}$$
$$r(x-7)=rx-7r$$

steps.title: Match the coefficients
steps.content:
The coefficient of $x$ on the left is $4$, so the coefficient of $x$ on the right must also be $4$.
$$r=4$$

steps.title: Match the constants
steps.content:
Now match the constant terms.
$$9-\frac{s}{11}=-7(4)$$
$$9-\frac{s}{11}=-28$$
$$-\frac{s}{11}=-37$$
$$s=407$$
The answer is 407.
